title: Community of tourism professionals
body: ![](http://comunidad.hosteltur.com/images/comunidad_hosteltur_logo_beta.gif)As I’ve already discussed in [this other post](http://www.xarop.com/el-viajero-20/), the internet in general—and in particular the new social media platforms geared toward travel and travelers—has made it much easier to plan and book our vacations, getaways, or business trips. Tourism professionals have also realized this (better late than never) and have seen that social media is also a very effective tool for them. In the Spanish-speaking market, we have sites like [Turismo 2.0](http://www.turismo20.com/) or the recent [Comunidad Hosteltur](http://comunidad.hosteltur.com/), in the development of which I participated, specifically in the design of the interfaces.
